[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0011101 4
2 0101001 3
3 1000010 2
4 0000010 1
5 0000110 2
6 0111001 4
7 0110001 3

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 1101011 5
23 32 1001010 3
34 43 0010110 3
45 54 0111111 6
56 65 0111001 4 match 6
67 76 0111001 4 match 6
70 07 0011111 5

02 20 1011111 6
13 31 0101011 4
24 42 1011110 5
35 53 0111011 5
46 64 0110111 5
57 75 0111001 4 match 6
60 06 0111111 6
71 17 0111001 4 match 6

03 30 0011111 5
14 41 0111111 6
25 52 1111011 6
36 63 0110011 4
47 74 0011111 5
50 05 0111111 6
61 16 0111001 4 match 6
72 27 1011011 5

04 40 0011111 5
15 51 0111001 4 match 6
26 62 1111011 6
37 73 0011011 4
